const Card = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    padding: 16,
    borderRadius: '$md.rad',
    background: '$surface.bg',
    direction: 'vertical',
    gap: '$sm.gap'
  }
})

const App = () => (
  <Col style={{ gap: '$md.gap' }}>
    <Card>
      <Title style={{ color: '$heading.col' }}>Erste Karte</Title>
      <Text style={{ color: '$default.col' }}>Inhalt der ersten Karte</Text>
    </Card>
    
    <Card>
      <Title style={{ color: '$heading.col' }}>Zweite Karte</Title>
      <Text style={{ color: '$default.col' }}>Inhalt der zweiten Karte</Text>
    </Card>
  </Col>
)

response.reactCode:
const Card = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    padding: 16,
    borderRadius: '$md.rad',
    background: '$surface.bg',
    direction: 'vertical',
    gap: '$sm.gap'
  }
})

const App = () => (
  <Col style={{ gap: '$md.gap' }}>
    <Card>
      <Title style={{ color: '$heading.col' }}>Erste Karte</Title>
      <Text style={{ color: '$default.col' }}>Inhalt der ersten Karte</Text>
    </Card>
    
    <Card>
      <Title style={{ color: '$heading.col' }}>Zweite Karte</Title>
      <Text style={{ color: '$default.col' }}>Inhalt der zweiten Karte</Text>
    </Card>
  </Col>
)
